description: M.M.U. Mufaris Kariyappar Vs. Assistant Commissioner Department of Agrarian Developmentand Four Others M.M.U. Mufaris Kariyappar Vs. Assistant Commissioner Department of Agrarian Developmentand Four Others View More before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: M.M.U. Mufaris Kariyappar Vs. Assistant Commissioner Department of Agrarian Developmentand Four Others M.M.U. Mufaris Kariyappar Vs. Assistant Commissioner Department of Agrarian Developmentand Four Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
keywords: Order of eviction made by a Magistrate under s 8(2) of Agrarian Development Act No. 46 of 2000-Can a person question before a Magistrate Court as to the legality or proprietary of the order that may be made by the Commissioner General of Agrarian Development under section 7(7) of the Agrarian Development Act No. 46 of 2000 directing him to vacate such extent of paddy land on or before the date specified therein in an action instituted in the Magistrate Court by the Commissioner General of Agrarian Development by presenting to it a written report under section 8(1) of the Agrarian Development Act No. 46 of 2000-issuance of an order of eviction by a Magistrate under section 8(2) of the Agrarian Development Act No. 46 of 2000-a ministerial act.
legistation: Article 138 of the Constitution to be read with 154P(3)(b) thereof-Sections 7(7), 7(7)(b)(ii) 8(1) and 8(2) of the Agrarian Development Act No. 46 of 2000.
